claim_bullets.bullet_text: Linear recursion is a divide and conquer strategy (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.111-113).
It breaks problems into smaller subproblems (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.111-113).
Flattening arrays uses linear recursion (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.111-113).
Terminal case is empty or non-array element (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.111-113).

source_record_text: This section from JavaScript Allongé introduces linear recursion as a form of divide and conquer strategy for problem solving in programming.
